texts.Welcome_Text: This is a minimalist, single layer application startup template for the ABP Framework.
texts.Name: Name
texts.AreYouSureToDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
texts.BookDeletionConfirmationMessage: Are you sure to delete the book '{0}'?
texts.ExerciseListCouldNotBeLoaded: Exercise list could not be loaded. Please refresh the page and try again.
texts.NoExercisesAvailableForWorkoutPlan: No exercise found. Please create an exercise first.
texts.WorkoutPlanShouldHaveAtLeastOneExercise: Workout plan must contain at least one exercise.
texts.WorkoutPlanExerciseValuesMustBePositive: Order, sets and repetitions must be greater than zero and rest must be zero or positive.
texts.WorkoutPlanOrderValuesMustBeUnique: Order values must be unique in a workout plan.
texts.WorkoutPlanExerciseCannotRepeat: Same exercise cannot be repeated in the same workout plan.
texts.SomeExercisesNotFound: One or more selected exercises were not found.
